description_long: This is a rectangular, four-drawer filing cabinet with a sturdy, boxy construction. The main body is a reddish-brown color with a subtle wood grain texture, bordered and reinforced by thick beige or tan bands along the edges and between the drawers. Each drawer features a prominent, simple handle in the same beige color, designed for easy gripping and pulling. The sides and top are solid, with the beige bands providing both structural support and visual contrast. The cabinet appears robust and functional, suitable for storing documents or small items. Its design is practical and utilitarian, making it ideal for organized storage in busy environments.
description: A robust, four-drawer filing cabinet with a reddish-brown wood texture and beige structural bands, featuring simple beige handles for each drawer.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face of the topmost drawer with a beige handle and the stacked arrangement of all four drawers.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid reddish-brown panel with three vertical beige bands and the geometric reinforcement details.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back panel and the ends of the beige bands, but without handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid side panel and vertical beige bands.
